checks.name: npm run validate
checks.evidence: 32 node tests passed; MDE parser checked 65 files; traceability validator checked 19 files and required IDs through GEN-016/prf-rerank; fixture index check passed; fixture evaluation passed.

checks.name: live refined prf-rerank evaluation
checks.evidence: experiments/cranfield-v0/evaluation-live-prf-rerank-phrase-gen016.json records MAP 0.2699, nDCG@10 0.3260, Precision@10 0.2680, Recall@10 0.4469, MRR 0.5622 over 225 live Cranfield queries.

checks.name: live prf-expand-rerank evaluation
checks.evidence: experiments/cranfield-v0/evaluation-live-prf-expand-rerank-gen016.json records nDCG@10 0.3219, so expanded retrieval is rejected.

blocked_or_skipped.name: Cloudflare deploy verification
blocked_or_skipped.reason: No deployment was requested; GEN-016 leaves the public default unchanged.

high_findings.summary: ARCH-0.2-candidate remains candidate-only until BEIR transferability is measured.

evidence_quality: GEN-016 has live evaluation evidence for the improved candidate and rejected expanded-retrieval branch. The improvement is small and Cranfield-only, so promotion remains deferred.
